states.name: Lucija
states.title: Demon Fist
states.description: Eighteen years ago, the Eternal destroyed her village. Lucija, a little girl, was the only survivor. She took two demon statues' faces, the only bit of intact art from the remains, and swore she'd get vengeance upon him.

states.name: Lucija
states.title: Demon Fist
states.description: As Lucija masters the martial arts in her pursuit of vengeance against the Eternal, the demon statues speak to her and lend her power in her crusade. They've become the orphan Lucija's surrogate parents.
